channel.title: Blog & knowledge base on Eugent
channel.description: Recent content in Blog & knowledge base on Eugent

item.title: Digital sovereignty with AI agents
item.description:
More and more organisations discover that a single generic AI solution rarely fits their own processes. The future lies in an ecosystem of specialised AI agents that work together, each with its own task and its own memory.

From tool to ecosystem

An agent for customer contact, one for documents, one for analysis: together they form a team that fits your business processes. A central layer commands them and keeps them consistent.

item.title: What the AI Act means for your data strategy
item.description:
The European AI Act changes how organisations look at AI. Not as a standalone tool, but as part of a data strategy in which responsibility, transparency and portability are central. In this article we lay out the practical consequences.

Ownership as the starting point

Those who deploy AI seriously want to know where data is processed and who has access to it. By choosing open interfaces and portable components from the design onward, your data stays yours, and you keep the freedom to switch model or vendor.
